question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordFileDownloader.java -> Scope: Critical: Network not being able to confirm new transactions (total network shutdown)'] [Function: download()] Can an unprivileged external user cause the scheduled download() task to hang indefinitely by injecting a sidecar file that causes streamFileProvider.get() inside downloadSidecars() to never complete, blocking the Flux.block() call and permanently stalling the Spring @Scheduled thread, preventing any further record file downloads and halting transaction confirmation?
